titleStmt.title: SII 20.13: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 13. SAUNDATTI, PARASGAD TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT. (B.K. No. 58 of 1935-36.)

p.hi: On a slab set up in the Basti-guḍi.

summary.p: The inscription in Sanskrit and Kannaḍa language is dated in Śaka 797, Manmatha, but is engraved in characters of about the 11th or 12th century A.D. The Śaka and the cyclic year correspond to A.D. 875-76.

It records a grant of eighteen nivartanas of land by Mahāsāmanta Pṛithvīrāma, the son Mēṛaḍa, to a Jinēndra-bhavana got built by himself. The donee is stated to be the disciple of Indrakīrtisvāmin who in turn was the disciple of Guṇakīrtimunīśvara. The latter again was the disciple of Muḷḷabhaṭṭa of Maiḷāpatīrtha and Kārēyagaṇa.

Lines 1 to 4 record a later grant, made by Kanna, of six nivartanas of land in the sīvaṭa Muḷgunda in Sugandhavartti-12. Lines 18-19 state that the grant made by Pṛithvīrāma was renewed by Kārttavīrya and (his wife) Bhāgalāṁbikā on the occasion of a solar eclipse.
The donors of all the grants are of the Raṭṭa family, Mērada being the first member.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.note: The inscription is published in JBBRAS, Vol. X, pp. 196 ff.
div.p:
© dvādaśagrāmādhiṣṭhānasya sugandhavarttisamandhini . grāmē muḷugundākhyē sīvaṭē ṣa�varttanaṁ . dēvasya caravē dattaṁ .
namaśyaṁ kannabhūbhujā . tasya dakṣiṇabhāgē tiṁtriṇīvṛkṣayōrdvayōḥ (.) madhyē
yā sthitā bhūmirddattā śrī kannarabhūbhujā . sugandhavarti sīmeyinda paḍuvalu pi
riya kōlalu mattaru 6 .
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
śrīmanmaiḷāpatīrtthasya gaṇē kārēyanāmani . babhūvōgratapōyuktaḥ muḷḷabhaṭṭārakō gaṇē .
tacchiṣyō guṇavānnūriḥ guṇakīrttimunīśvaraḥ . tasyādhāsiṁdrakīrtti svāmī kāmamadāpahaḥ .Readtasmādāsīdaṁdrakīrtti.
tacchātraḥ pṛthvīrāmaḥ lakṣmīrāmāvirājitaḥ . satyaratnaprarōhādriḥ mēṟaḍasyāgranandanaḥ .
śrī kṛṣṇarājadēvasya lakṣmīlakṣitavakṣasaḥ . namrabhūpāḷabṛndasya pādāṁburuhasēvakaḥ
yasya bāḷapratāpā gnajvāḷānikaraśōṣitastamudri ptāsuhṛddarpparasō niśśēṣakō yathā . yasya rājanvaThe letterpā is written below the line.Read ddṛ.
tī bhūmirjjātānaddākaraiḥ karaiḥ . rājñō yō dhīmatō nītimārggō durggabhayaṁkaraḥ . yasya saṁkrīḍatē kīrtti
haṁsī lōkasarōvarē . madvākyaṁ praśṛ taṁ jātaṁ praṇatārāti bhūpatēḥ . sapta satyā navatyāca samāyuReadsṛ.
kē sasaptasu sakakāḷēśvatītēṣu manmathāhvayavatsarē grāmē sugandha vartyākhyē tēna bhūpēna kāritaṁ jinēṁ
drabhavanaṁ dattaṁ tasyāṣṭādaśa nivarttanaṁ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvī vallabhamahārājādhirājaṁ
paramēśvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ rāṣṭrakūṭakuḷatiḷakaṁ śrīmatkṛṣṇarājadēvavijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vṛddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahā
sāmasta vīralakṣmīkāntaṁ virōdhisāmantanagavajradaṇḍaṁ vidvajjanakamaḷamārttaṇḍaṁ subhaṭacūḍāmaṇi bhyatyacintāmaṇi
śrīmanmahāsāmantēna pṛthvīrāmēna svakārita jinēndrabhavanāya caturṣu sthaḷēṣu sthitamaṣṭādaśanivarttanaṁ sarvvanamaśyaṁ dattaṁ . pṛ
thvīrāmēna yaddattaṁ nivarttanaṁ kārttavīryyēṇa bhūyaḥ svaguravē dattaṁ sarvabādāvivarjjitaṁ sūryyō
parāga saṁkrāntau kārttavīryyāgrakāntayā śrībhāgalāṁbikā dēvyā (.) samasyaṁ kṛtamañjasā .
Digital edition of SII 20.13 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
